calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Jul-03-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Benjamin W. White, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Cypress HCM, LLC.
Michael Apathy, CEO of BPG Worldwide Inc. defaulted defendant(s).
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Defendant Michael Apathy stipulates to Entry of Default Judgment.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $73372,00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,079.18
Costs: $564.35
Total Judgment in the amount of $79,015.53
Judgment signed in open court.
